seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The third paragraph invites recipients to join.
new_constraint: The third paragraph should focus on summarizing the content without including any invitations.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The third paragraph invites recipients to join. The third paragraph should focus on summarizing the content without including any invitations.

    *   *Interpretation A:* The user made a mistake and meant a different paragraph for the invitation.
    *   *Interpretation B:* The user wants a "trick" or a very specific stylistic choice (e.g., the invitation is implied or the summary *is* the invitation).

However, usually, in these types of prompts, the user might have misspoken.

    Subject: 📚 New Book Club: Let's get reading!

    Hi everyone,

    I hope you’re all doing well! I’ve been thinking about how much I miss our deep conversations and decided that it’s high time we started a book club. I’d love to get a group of us together to explore some great stories and share our perspectives.

    I’m planning to host our first gathering on [Date] at [Time] at my place. Please let me know if you can make it by [RSVP Date] so I can get a headcount for snacks and drinks!

    The club will involve selecting one novel per month, meeting to discuss the themes and characters over coffee or wine, and keeping a running list of our favorite reads of the year.

    Best,
    [Your Name]

    Subject: 📚 Let's start a book club!

    Hi everyone,

    I’ve been looking for a way to carve out some time for reading and meaningful conversation, and I thought starting a book club would be the perfect solution. I’m reaching out to see if you’d be interested in joining a small group of us to dive into some great books together.

    I’m planning to host our first meeting on [Date] at [Time] at my house. It would be wonderful to have you there to help kick things off!

    The club will focus on reading one contemporary fiction novel each month, meeting to discuss the plot and character development over snacks, and maintaining a shared list of recommendations to explore different genres throughout the year.

    Let me know if you're interested!

    Best,
    [Your Name]
